items.title: CSRF — Cross-Site Request Forgery
items.description: CSRF tricks a logged-in user's browser into sending an authenticated request to a target site without their knowledge, because browsers automatically attach cookies to matching requests.

items.title: HTTP Headers & CF-Connecting-IP Spoofing
items.description: If a server blindly trusts IP headers like CF-Connecting-IP or X-Forwarded-For without verifying the request actually came through Cloudflare, attackers can spoof any IP address.
